name: Pasquale Romano
background: Pasquale Romano has served as a member of our Board since February 2011 and served as our President and Chief Executive Officer from February 2011 to November 2023. Prior to joining ChargePoint, Mr. Romano co-founded 2Wire, Inc., where he served as President and CEO.

company_affiliations.name: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Member of the Board of Directors
